content.code:
package main

import (
	"crypto/ed25519"
	"fmt"
)

func main() {
	seed := make([]byte, ed25519.SeedSize)
	seed[0] = 3
	privateKey := ed25519.NewKeyFromSeed(seed)
	publicKey := privateKey.Public().(ed25519.PublicKey)
	message := []byte("update-manifest|v1|artifact-3")
	signature := ed25519.Sign(privateKey, message)
	valid := ed25519.Verify(publicKey, message, signature)
	changed := ed25519.Verify(publicKey, append(message, '!'), signature)
	fmt.Printf("valid=%t changed_valid=%t trust_policy_required=true fixture_key_only=true\n", valid, changed)
}
// Worked focus: crypto-go-ed25519-api — Generate, parse, sign, and verify Ed25519 keys and signatures with exact message/context rules and trusted key selection.
